---
title: "Teaching"
subtitle: "Explore the courses and workshops I've taught, complete with links to websites and open-source materials."
listing:
  type: table
  contents: "/*/*/index.qmd"
  sort: true
  sort-ui: true
  feed: true
  filter-ui: true
  image-align: left
  categories: numbered
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, categories]
comments: false
---
